---
title: "Python Packages 9 : Package Managers"
author: "nshephard"
date: "2022-11-30"
categories: [code, analysis, python, packages, packaging, git, github, gitlab]
image: https://live.staticflickr.com/5532/11233363983_59bfa8f4ad_k.jpg
---

# Poetry

# PDM

# Links

* [Poetry](https://python-poetry.org)
* [PDM](https://pdm.fming.dev/latest/)
